leadText: Sapphire (サファイア) has several referrals.

sections.title: Games
sections.text: Games [ edit | edit source ] For the Generation III game , see Pokémon Ruby and Sapphire Versions . For the Generation VI game , see Pokémon Omega Ruby and Alpha Sapphire . For the trailer of these games, see Pokémon Omega Ruby and Pokémon Alpha Sapphire Animated Trailer . For the Pokémon storage system playable on GameCube , see Pokémon Box Ruby & Sapphire . For the Pinball game, see Pokémon Pinball: Ruby & Sapphire .

sections.title: Manga
sections.text: Manga [ edit | edit source ] For the Pokémon Adventures manga chapter based on the Generation III games, see Ruby & Sapphire arc . For the Pokémon Adventures manga chapter based on the Generation VI games, see Omega Ruby & Alpha Sapphire arc . For the sequel to Pokémon Pocket Monsters , see Pokémon Ruby-Sapphire . For the manga about twin brothers Alpha and Omega, see Pokémon Omega Ruby Crimson Passion and Pokémon Alpha Sapphire Indigo Wisdom .
